rows.label: qev012403_MSG0001
rows.name:
A helicopter crash and an attack
by native creatures... I thought
my luck had run out, but...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev012403_MSG0002
rows.name:
Then you came to rescue us! It seems
God hasn't abandoned us just yet.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev012403_JNK0010
rows.name: Explain

rows.label: qev012403_SEL0011
rows.name:
Say that you came to rescue
them at Roscoll's request.

rows.label: qev012403_JNK0020
rows.name: Check

rows.label: qev012403_SEL0021
rows.name: Ask if the cargo is safe.

rows.label: qev012403_MSG0003
rows.name:
Our leader made the request?
...Hell might freeze over.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev012403_MSG0004
rows.name:
Roscoll is an incredibly stingy
man. I thought he wouldn't send
anyone to rescue us...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev012403_MSG0005
rows.name: I'm glad a brave BLADE like you came.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev012403_MSG0006
rows.name: ...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev012403_MSG0007
rows.name: You're so dry it leaves me speechless.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev012403_MSG0008
rows.name: I don't hate realists like that, though.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev012403_MSG0009
rows.name: Don't worry. The cargo and us are safe.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev012403_MSG0010
rows.name:
But we can't escape this predicament
unless we repair the helicopter.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev012403_MSG0011
rows.name:
I think Ciska's piloting technique and poor
mechanical maintenance are the causes, but
complaining here won't get us anywhere.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev012403_MSG0012
rows.name:
I'm sorry for constantly relying on you, but
could you gather a New-Type Anhydrous Radiator
and a Spherical Electromagnetic Motor?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev012403_MSG0013
rows.name:
I have to guard the helicopter, and
Ciska is doing maintenance inside,
so we can't leave this spot.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev012403_JNK0030
rows.name: Accept

rows.label: qev012403_SEL0031
rows.name: Willingly agree to take the job.

rows.label: qev012403_JNK0040
rows.name: Worry

rows.label: qev012403_SEL0041
rows.name:
Ask if Howard can really
defend this helicopter.

rows.label: qev012403_MSG0014
rows.name:
Thank you. I'm counting
on you for one more job.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev012403_MSG0015
rows.name:
H-Haha... I panicked earlier
and hid inside the helicopter,
but I'll be fine next time.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev012403_MSG0016
rows.name:
I'll protect that cheeky Ciska, the
helicopter, and all the cargo.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev012403_MSG0017
rows.name:
So, please go gather the
materials for the repairs.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev012403_MSG0018
rows.name:
New-Type Anhydrous Radiators are
easily found in the Primordial
Wilderness, so maybe you already have one?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev012403_MSG0019
rows.name:
For the Spherical Electromagnetic Motor, if
you cross the Elephant's Trunk to the north
and go further... there's the Great Nail.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev012403_MSG0020
rows.name:
A Collepedian told me you can find
them in the rocky mountain range
spreading northeast from the Great Nail.[ST:wait ]
